name: Whisk breaks in!
description:
Holy macaroni! I normally forgo descriptions because im not thar creative but good lord! Not a single sunset paradise bot on this website??

Even C.ai has some and im 99.8 precent sure that thing is going down the piss-shoot.

I guess i have a monopoly now?

If this ends up with more sunset paradise stuff getting created then I'd be a happy absol!
creator: Nikosunday63
